calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance bridge behavioural retest REDESIGN (headroom + continuous survival metric); successor to 603l
items.note: Routing output of failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-603l_2026-06-10. REDESIGN carrying BOTH fixes: (a) harder Stage-H regime (num_hazards 4->6, proximity_harm 0.10->0.15) at full uniform 603k+603j substrate for headroom so ARM_BASE_IA_ONLY sits below the binary survival ceiling; (b) continuous mean Stage-H survival duration (mean episode length) as the load-bearing PRIMARY discrimination metric (full-bridge lift >=10% over base), binary G_H demoted to supplementary. Keeps the 5-arm discriminative harness + readiness/non-vacuity net (PAG freezes + ilPFC gate engage on base, each enabled bridge half credits >=2/3, base harm landscape discriminative >=2/3, else substrate_not_ready_requeue). claim_ids=[SD-059,MECH-358] multi-claim evidence; evidence_direction_per_claim. depends_on 603i/603j/603k. dry-run PASS end-to-end (self-routes substrate_not_ready at toy budget, as designed).

items.title: MECH-341 within-class-representative diversity GRADED confirmation (CEM pool-size dose-response; V3-EXQ-660 successor)
items.note: behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-B OWED graded confirmation. 660 PASSED but its within-class temperature sweep was byte-identical across T=0.5/1.0/2.0 (near-degenerate within-class scores -> softmax ~uniform at every T). This holds temperature FIXED and sweeps the CEM pool size K (cfg.hippocampal.num_candidates) in {16,32,64,128} -- the count of available within-class representatives, the actual graded axis. Pre-registered: non-vacuity (avail distinct within-class reps rise with K -> else substrate_not_ready_requeue) + C_GRADED (per-seed paired lift monotone-nondecreasing, Delta(128)-Delta(16)>=0.05 nats on >=2/3 seeds). NO supersede -- 660 stays standing. evidence; claim_ids=[MECH-341]. Dry-run PASS (K honored 16->128, avail rises 2.9->40.5, routing OK). Queued alongside concurrent V3-EXQ-603o; working-tree-vs-HEAD audit clean before append.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization-necessity: task-distribution-shift phase-3 redesign (supersedes 610f)
items.note: IGW-20260609-038 / failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610f_2026-06-08 user-confirmed route (a). Replaces the noise-only phase-3 with a genuine TASK-DISTRIBUTION SHIFT (SD-054 reef-bipartite layout + hazard_food_attraction=0.8 -> flee-to-reef single dominant optimum conflicting with the phase-0-2 forage policy) so the un-crystallized control suffers catastrophic forgetting (D2 collapse) while the EWC-anchored arm resists (D1). reef_enabled in all phases keeps world_obs_dim=275 constant. Decisive substrate-incapacity fork pre-registered: if D2 still fails on a genuine task-shift -> accept INV-074 substrate_ceiling and STOP the 610 cascade. 5 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 2500 ep x 200 steps; verified wiring (_assert_fixes_wired) + D3 non-vacuity gate carried from 610f.

items.title: Curriculum-trained affective fishtank showcase (scaffolded curriculum + harm-pathway; counterpart to V3-EXQ-664)
items.note: Diagnostic TELEMETRY showcase (claim_ids=[]); does NOT weight governance. The developmentally-scaffolded counterpart to V3-EXQ-664: trains the agent through the ScaffoldedSD054OnboardingScheduler curriculum (Stage-0/0b/P0/Stage-H/P1) WITH scaffold_train_harm_pathway ON, then runs an affective eval emitting the 664 affect schema for fishtank_viz.html. Dry-run smoke PASS: curriculum runs end-to-end, harm pathway trains (~180 steps), z_goal/wanting ACTIVE at eval (~0.39 vs 664's flat 0). PAG freeze motor-override disabled for the eval (the trained agent's chronic high z_harm_a otherwise freeze-locks it -- itself the z_harm_a-saturation story; affect telemetry stays faithful). MACHINE-PINNED to the Mac so the episode_log companion lands on origin (Phase-3 cloud workers strand episode_log side-files; see V3-EXQ-664).
